Resolution: Verify the application or deployment name is correct.
Wait for the service to restart and retry the operation.
Check the detection method or script syntax for errors.
Increase the maximum runtime for the deployment type or investigate slow network connectivity.
Verify the referenced item (application, content, etc.) still exists.
Check the detection method script or WQL query for syntax errors.

Message: The object or subsystem has not been initialized
Resolution: Restart the CCM client service (CcmExec). If issue persists, reinstall the client.
Check network connectivity to the management point. Verify BITS service is running.
The content may be corrupted. Redistribute content to the DP.
Check management point connectivity and policy refresh.

Message: The script execution has timed out
Resolution: Increase the maximum runtime for the deployment type, or optimize the detection/install script.

Message: The application was not detected after installation completed
Resolution: Review the detection method in AppDiscovery.log. Verify the detection rule matches the installed product version and path.

Message: Application was still detected after uninstall completed
Resolution: Review the uninstall command and detection method. The uninstall may not have fully removed the application.
Sign the detection or install script, or change the execution policy on the client.

Message: Application requirement evaluation or detection failed
Resolution: Check requirement rules and detection methods on the deployment type.
Check the installer log for the specific MSI or EXE error. Common causes: app already installed, insufficient permissions, disk space.

Message: Content not found on distribution point
Resolution: Redistribute the content to the local distribution point. Verify the DP is healthy and the package is fully distributed.
Check if the update was superseded or if a maintenance window closed. Review UpdatesDeployment.log.

Message: No current or future service window exists to install the software update
Resolution: Verify a maintenance window exists for the target collection that allows software updates.

Message: Failed to add update source for WUAgent
Resolution: Check WSUS configuration on the client. Verify the SUP is configured correctly.

Message: Failed to verify the executable file is valid or to construct the command line
Resolution: Verify the install command path and executable exist in the content. Check for missing content files.

Message: Failed to access all provided program locations
Resolution: Content cannot be located. Redistribute content and verify DP accessibility.

Message: Not enough available space in cache or disk full
Resolution: Clear the CCM cache or increase the cache size. Check disk space on the client.

Message: Client cache is smaller than the requested content
Resolution: Increase the CCM client cache size to accommodate the content.
Check the application install log for more details. This is a generic error wrapper.
